understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') such that all goal tiles are simultaneously occupied. Each level had a finite step budget, and the game was won by clearing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement and selection were handled via CLICK actions. Clicking a target position would instantly teleport the currently selected piece to that coordinate if the target was valid (not blocked). Repeated clicks on the same target moved additional pieces from a stack at the source, suggesting multiple identical pieces could be removed one by one. Obstacles blocked movement, causing the piece to remain in place. The piece that was last clicked or the only remaining piece likely became auto‑selected. MOVE actions existed but were not used in this run; the main interaction was clicking coordinates directly.
